## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss HeyGen's content strategy, tools directory launch, and outreach initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Tools directory to launch this week with 20 pages; 16 more next week](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Backlink strategy to be implemented for competitive keywords](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [New outreach campaign targeting marketing agencies to begin soon](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Content collaboration and guest posting initiatives to be explored for SEO boost](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)

## Topics

### Content and Tools Directory Update

  - [20 tool pages ready for launch this week, 16 more next week](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Tools directory to go live, potentially named "AI Tools" or "AI Video Tools"](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Nav to review content in docs and coordinate with Caitlin for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [GIFs and screenshots from community.hagen.com to be incorporated where relevant](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

### Image and Avatar Assets

  - [New textures and designs being developed for avatar presentations](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Team exploring high-res versions of in-product assets (currently in WebM format)](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Nav shared examples of new card-style designs with dynamic, popping visuals](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)

### Translation Pages and Publishing

  - [Template updated based on editing comments](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Initial publication strategy: start with footer link, avoid top nav placement initially](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Monitor sign-up rates as KPI for adjusting placement strategy](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)

### Backlink and Outreach Strategy

  - [Jimmy proposed backlink exchange and content collaboration for competitive keywords](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Target keywords: video translation, video generation, digital twin, lip sync, dubbing](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Suggested using AROPs for outreach and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Discussed setting up email campaigns using tools like Apollo IO or smart lead](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)

### Marketing Agency Focus

  - [New agency use case page launched on HeyGen.com](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Planning to target both large brand agencies and boutique agencies](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [E-learning sector identified as the next focus area after marketing agencies](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)

### Community Program

  - [Community program to be launched in the coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [Nav overseeing the initiative to unify different groups and content creation efforts](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Launch tools directory by Friday with available content](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Nav to tag Caitlin for implementation of tool pages](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Sadira to prepare strategy for next week after tools publication](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Begin setting up backlink and outreach campaigns, starting with marketing agencies](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Nav to follow up on community.hagen.com article status](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Jimmy to set up email outreach infrastructure (10 Gmail accounts, 5 domains)](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Explore integration of new avatar designs and textures into content](https://fathom.video/share/MzCsgV7BxvzhKPYYYCiWdQ1RAy3cRc7v?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
